name: arenahub
description: ArenaHub — sports arena booking platform (FYP). Root task runner.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.migrate: cd backend && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.migrate:down: cd backend && uv run alembic downgrade -1
scripts.makemigration: cd backend && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.seed: cd backend && uv run python -m scripts.seed
scripts.test:cov: cd backend && uv run coverage run -m pytest && uv run coverage report
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:web
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check .
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:web
scripts.format:backend: cd backend && uv run black . && uv run ruff check --fix .
scripts.prepare: pre-commit install || echo "pre-commit not installed; run: uv tool install pre-commit"
